title: Part 7 – Passage unique : programme de fidélité
instructions: Lisez la description du programme, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Sunrise Hotels — Loyalty Program: Level Up

Join Level Up and start earning points every time you stay with us.

How it works:
— Earn 10 points for every dollar spent on room bookings.
— Earn 5 points for every dollar spent at our restaurants and spas.
— Double points on stays booked directly through our website or app.

Reward tiers:
— Silver: 5,000 points — includes a complimentary room upgrade (subject to availability).
— Gold: 15,000 points — includes free breakfast daily and priority check-in.
— Platinum: 30,000 points — includes all Gold benefits plus one free night per stay.

Points expire if your account has no activity for 18 months. To join, simply create an account on our website. Membership is free.

questions.prompt: How many points does a member earn per dollar spent on room bookings?
questions.explanation: "Earn 10 points for every dollar spent on room bookings".

questions.prompt: How can members earn double points?
choices: By staying more than three nights
By booking through the website or app
By dining at the hotel restaurant
questions.explanation: "Double points on stays booked directly through our website or app".

questions.prompt: What benefit comes with Gold status?
choices: Free breakfast daily and priority check-in
questions.explanation: "Gold: includes free breakfast daily and priority check-in".

choices: After 18 months of no account activity
questions.explanation: "Points expire if your account has no activity for 18 months".
